task_completion.visual_evidence: QBlade interface showing the NACA 4418 airfoil loaded and a polar generated with XFoil parameters (Re=1M, Ncrit=9, -5 to 20 deg).

task_completion.description: Design the 3-blade HAWT rotor with specified dimensions
task_completion.visual_evidence: QBlade rotor design module showing a 3-blade rotor with Radius=5m, Hub=0.5m, and a table/graph indicating a linear chord (0.8m to 0.3m) and linear twist (15deg to 0deg).

task_completion.description: Set up the two BEM simulations with and without Prandtl Tip Loss
task_completion.visual_evidence: QBlade simulation module showing two defined simulations named 'BEM_TipLoss_ON' and 'BEM_TipLoss_OFF', configured for a TSR sweep of 1-12 (step 0.5) at 10m/s wind speed.
QBlade graphs or result tables displaying the performance curves (e.g., Cp vs TSR) for both 'BEM_TipLoss_ON' and 'BEM_TipLoss_OFF' simulations.

task_completion.description: Save the QBlade project to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: QBlade window title bar showing 'tip_loss_study.wpa' or a file manager showing the file saved in the '~/Documents/projects/' directory.

task_completion.description: Create a report comparing Max Cp, CT, and percentage increase
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor open showing 'tip_loss_report.txt' in '~/Documents/' containing a comparison of Maximum Cp and corresponding CT for both cases, explicitly stating the percentage increase when tip loss is ignored.

integrity.description: Agent used the QBlade GUI to perform the study
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show active interaction with the QBlade application windows, menus, and modules, rather than just terminal commands or text manipulation.
The text report contains specific, calculated numerical values for Cp, CT, and percentage difference, rather than placeholder text or exact copy-pastes of the prompt.
The report shows that the Maximum Cp for 'BEM_TipLoss_OFF' is strictly greater than the Maximum Cp for 'BEM_TipLoss_ON', and values are within physically realistic bounds.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified paths: Project must be saved at '/home/ga/Documents/projects/tip_loss_study.wpa' and the report at '/home/ga/Documents/tip_loss_report.txt'. Physically realistic Cp values must fall between 0.05 and 0.593 (the Betz limit). Disabling Prandtl tip loss correction ('BEM_TipLoss_OFF') should result in a higher Maximum Cp compared to when it is enabled ('BEM_TipLoss_ON').
